page_desc: We help people start businesses. The kind of people that most business education was never designed for.
founder_p1: Samuel has spent over a decade helping people start businesses across three continents. He holds an MBA and an MSc in Economics. He knows the theory — but more importantly, he knows what actually works in practice.
founder_p2: Before starting Mind and Method Academy, Samuel built and ran a property company that brought in over £15,000 a month. He has coached hundreds of people through the hardest part of starting a business — the beginning.
founder_p3: Samuel works with people who want to start but keep getting stuck. He understands them because he has spent years in the room with them. He knows what holds them back: the fear of losing money, the fear of looking foolish, and the gap between reading about business and actually doing it.
gap_heading: Most business education misses the people who need it most.
gap_p1: At one end, there are expensive MBA programmes and accelerators. They are built for people who already have money, contacts, and confidence. At the other end, there is endless free content — YouTube, podcasts, social media. It feels like progress, but nothing changes.
gap_p2: In the middle are millions of people who keep getting stuck. They have the ability. They have the ambition. They just lack a clear, affordable plan and someone to walk them through it. They try things in short bursts — a course, a book, an event — then go back to their normal routine.
gap_p3: We built Mind and Method Academy to close that gap. Real business education. Simple, practical, and affordable. No £30,000 MBA needed.
callout_quote: "They keep reading about business. They keep watching videos about business. But they never actually start one."
callout_attr: — The problem we exist to solve
approach_heading: Everything we teach leads to action.
approach_desc: We found seven things that stop people from getting their first paying client. Every programme we run is built to fix each one.
